summary: Attempted to execute V0.8.5 M4 System-Level Architecture Refactor Retry via Opencode dispatch after reported quota replenishment. However, the API endpoint (vveai.com / gpt-5.4 / gpt-4o) still returned quota and model-permission errors ('user quota is not enough', '该令牌无权使用模型'). The Orchestrator again successfully maintained strict Separation of Duties (SoD) and refused to fallback to rudimentary hand-written shell patching.
